scenarios.name: 趨勢擴張
scenarios.subtitle: 水位上升 · 內外同步轉強
scenarios.when: Water is rising with broad internal participation and supportive external markets. ArkQuant mode: selective_add.

scenarios.name: 主線催化
scenarios.subtitle: 題材驗證 · 主線續航
scenarios.when: A dominant theme has a concrete catalyst, but broad market risk-on is not yet confirmed. ArkQuant mode: theme_follow_no_chase.

scenarios.name: 高位控速
scenarios.subtitle: 水位健康 · 追價降速
scenarios.when: Water remains high/healthy but slope slows or external pressure rises; avoid indiscriminate chasing. ArkQuant mode: slow_selective_add.

scenarios.name: 輪動換手
scenarios.subtitle: 強弱分明 · 汰弱留強
scenarios.when: Breadth is mixed and capital rotates between themes; not a broad retreat. ArkQuant mode: rotate_after_confirmation.

scenarios.name: 有序回檔
scenarios.subtitle: 健康修正 · 等待承接
scenarios.when: A pullback inside a still-healthy market; wait for support and confirmation. ArkQuant mode: wait_for_pullback.

scenarios.name: 風險收縮
scenarios.subtitle: 風險升溫 · 降低曝險
scenarios.when: External or internal risk deteriorates enough to reduce exposure. ArkQuant mode: reduce_exposure.

scenarios.name: 低位修復
scenarios.subtitle: 低位回升 · 小額試單
scenarios.when: Water is low but improving; repair phase, not full expansion. ArkQuant mode: small_probe.

scenarios.name: 事件觀望
scenarios.subtitle: 事件未定 · 等待落地
scenarios.when: Major earnings, macro events, holidays, or pre-event uncertainty dominate. ArkQuant mode: wait_for_event_resolution.

selectionRule: Classify by Ark regime first: hard event/risk states, then water regime, external risk, breadth, and theme catalyst. Do not use one catch-all high-level divergence bucket.
